notice_content:
This is not a traditional resume.

This site shows not only the projects I build, but also how I think about systems and software.

I focus on solving real problems with simple and lasting solutions.
telekom_intro: Modern websites, online sales platforms and custom software solutions designed to help businesses grow, work faster and look professional online.

telekom_areas.title: Website Design
telekom_areas.description: Modern, fast and mobile-friendly websites for companies, personal brands and small businesses.

telekom_areas.title: E-Commerce Solutions
telekom_areas.description: Online store solutions so you can sell your products on the web—trustworthy and easy to manage.

telekom_areas.title: Custom Software
telekom_areas.description: Tailored software for your business needs to make processes more organized and practical.

telekom_areas.title: Management Panels
telekom_areas.description: Clean, powerful control panels to manage content, customers, products or operations with ease.

telekom_areas.title: Mobile Applications
telekom_areas.description: Modern app solutions to deliver your services on mobile and improve the user experience.

telekom_areas.title: Digital Business Solutions
telekom_areas.description: Beyond websites—holistic solutions so your business looks more organized and professional online.

process_subtitle: I develop projects with a planned, fast and sustainable system.

process_steps.title: Analysis
process_steps.description: I identify requirements and project goals.

process_steps.title: Design
process_steps.description: Modern, user-focused interface design is prepared.

process_steps.title: Test
process_steps.description: System performance and compatibility tests are run.

process_steps.title: Launch
process_steps.description: The project goes live and is delivered.

narrative_intro: A software project is not just code. It gains value through solid structure, clear flow and a trustworthy user experience.
narrative_quote: Good software is not only a working build. It is an understandable, trustworthy and manageable experience over time.

narrative_cards.title: Planning & Design
narrative_cards.description: Every project starts with understanding needs. Without proper planning, clean design and clear user flow, a strong digital product cannot emerge.

narrative_cards.title: Development & Structure
narrative_cards.description: Turning design into a working product requires clean code, organized structure and a sustainable development approach.

narrative_cards.title: Launch & Improvement
narrative_cards.description: Real value appears after a product goes live. Speed, compatibility, updates and ease of use must be tracked continuously.

narrative_cards.title: Ongoing Growth & Support
narrative_cards.description: A digital product keeps evolving after launch. Updates, improvements and adjustments to new needs keep the system running efficiently over time.

software_intro: Real projects, real products. Digital work I have built in web, mobile and software.
delivery_mindset_desc: I finish what I start. Small, shipped products beat big unfinished ideas.
user_first_ui_desc: Clear navigation, readable layout, and mobile-first structure are non-negotiable.
maintainable_builds_desc: Clean components, consistent styling, and simple architecture that can scale later.

software_projects.title: MK Field Ops
software_projects.description: A SaaS-based operations management system for planning, tracking and managing telecom field operations.

software_projects.title: MK Digital Systems
software_projects.description: A digital production brand building websites, e-commerce platforms, custom software and digital solutions.

software_projects.title: Mavi Kadraj
software_projects.description: A digital portfolio platform built around photography, nature and visual storytelling.

software_projects.title: Kadraj Rotam
software_projects.description: A photography-focused route discovery platform. A digital project for visual stories and discovery points.

software_projects.title: Gönül Pusulası
software_projects.description: A simple digital text platform built around poetry, emotion and narrative.

software_projects.title: Mavi İletişim Demo Website
software_projects.description: Demo corporate website built to showcase a frontend product system structure. Demonstrates product listing, category hierarchy, product detail page, variation selection, and demo cart interaction, with a focus on UI architecture and product flow.
focus: Product detail page and variation selection interaction
Demo cart workflow and state management

software_projects.title: Şiir Dünyası
software_projects.description: A simple content platform for sharing poetry and literary content online.

software_projects.title: Mavi Kadrajla Öğreniyorum
software_projects.description: A simple Android education app for children, focused on visual learning.

software_projects.title: Job Tracking – HTML Tool
software_projects.description: A simple browser-based job tracking and note-taking tool.

photo_intro:
This is not a workflow section.
There is no "process" here.

These are simply moments I kept —
a feeling, a place, a moment in time.
photo_add_hint: Add images under public/photos/ and list them in this category.
photo_quote: Some photos don't explain anything. They just remind you who you are.
photo_calm_desc: A quiet frame can say more than a loud story.
photo_light_desc: The right light turns an ordinary scene into a memory.
photo_belonging_desc: Places change — but some corners feel like home forever.
instagram_intro: Three glimpses from my feed — moments, light, and places.

photo_categories.title: Nature
photo_categories.description: Landscapes, sunsets, sky and quiet light — places where I slow down and breathe.
photo_categories.label: Scene

photo_categories.title: Quiet Moments
photo_categories.description: Small silences, honest light, simple scenes that stay with you.
photo_categories.label: Moment

photo_categories.title: On the Road
photo_categories.description: Movement, weather, roadside stories — the world as it happens.
photo_categories.label: Frame

photo_categories.title: Lines & Patterns
photo_categories.description: Shapes, symmetry, textures — beauty found in structure.
photo_categories.label: Pattern

principles_intro: Quality is defined not only by what you choose to build, but also by what you deliberately choose not to build.
principles_intro_before: Quality is defined not only by what you choose to build, but also by
principles_intro_accent: what you deliberately choose not to build
value_technical_depth_desc: Working at the core of systems, not just on the surface
value_collaboration_desc: Strong results come from multidisciplinary teamwork
value_outcome_desc: Clear objectives lead to measurable results
value_selectivity_desc: Sustainable quality comes from choosing the right work
principles_final_quote: Great work starts with the right questions. And the right questions are shaped by technical depth and real-world experience.
principles_how_i_work_items: A problem is understood first, then solved.
Technical details are never separated from the bigger picture.
Documentation is the long-term memory of a project.
Testing is the only real source of trust.
principles_focus_items: Infrastructure projects that require real technical depth
The intersection of physical networks and digital systems
principles_avoid_items: Temporary fixes instead of sustainable solutions
Projects where documentation is treated as optional
contact_subtitle:
If you have a request, a suggestion or a project idea,
you can send me a message.
contact_placeholder_message: Hello, I have a website project. I would like to have a corporate site. Can we discuss the details?
contact_message_hint: You can describe your request or idea in a few sentences.
contact_success: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon.
contact_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
footer_desc:
I work on modern web applications, user interfaces and digital product development.

This website was created to share my software projects, development approach and personal work.
footer_portfolio_note: This website was created to present my work in software development and digital product design as a professional portfolio.
